title: Review round 1: Rust API idiomaticity pass
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — One silent type inconsistency (Vec<String> vs Vec<Id> in the egui event boundary) will become a correctness bug if Id gains normalization semantics. The OwnerPresence::Unknown filter footgun is a logical error waiting for a caller to hit it. The OnceLock removal is a deliberate but debatable tradeoff. The doc comment issue is cosmetic. No security surface is introduced.
